title: A curated database reveals trends in single-cell transcriptomics.
author: Svensson V da Veiga Beltrame E Pachter L
content: S-EPMC7698659 PMC7698659 A curated database reveals trends in single-cell transcriptomics. The more than 1000 single-cell transcriptomics studies that have been published to date constitute a valuable and vast resource for biological discovery.
